title: quamoclit lindleyi
intro: Quamoclit lindleyi, also known as the Lindley's clematis or sweet autumn clematis, is a flowering plant in the clematis genus. It is a woody vine native to China and India, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are used to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and digestive problems. Quamoclit lindleyi is typically prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is used in herbal medicine to promote respiratory health, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive discomfort.
